recommendations.title: Mia madre
recommendations.overview: Margherita, a director in the middle of an existential crisis, has to deal with the inevitable and still unacceptable loss of her mother.

recommendations.title: Aprile
recommendations.overview: Nanni Moretti takes another look at the ebbs and flows of life in April 1996, as he becomes a father for the first time and seems unable to focus on his documentary about the upcoming national elections.

recommendations.title: Three Floors
recommendations.overview: Follows the lives of three families who live in a three-story building in a Roman neighbourhood.

recommendations.title: The Son's Room
recommendations.overview: A psychoanalyst and his family go through profound emotional trauma when their son dies in a scuba diving accident.

recommendations.title: Dear Diary
recommendations.overview: Nanni Moretti recalls in his diary three slice of life stories characterized by a sharply ironic look: in the first one he wanders through a deserted Rome, in the second he visits a reclusive friend on an island, and in the last he has to grapple wit

recommendations.title: Ecce Bombo
recommendations.overview: Michele Apicella, Goffredo, Mirko, and Vito are four high school friends who were on the forefront of the political protests that characterized the second half of the 1960s. Now a few years older, the four friends are no longer politically active and

recommendations.title: Bianca
recommendations.overview: Eccentric and full of manias, Michele is a young high school professor who defines himself as “not used to happiness”. He realizes his life is meaningless if he doesn’t have a woman by his side but, after a series of rather disastrous experiences, he

recommendations.title: The Mass Is Ended
recommendations.overview: The young priest Father Giulio returns to Rome, his hometown, after a long pilgrimage. Don Giulio hopes to live peacefully with his family and his friends, but discovers that many of them are depressed or frustrated, and some suicidal.

recommendations.title: Santiago, Italia
recommendations.overview: After the coup d'État of the Democratic government of Allende, the embassy of Italy in Santiago played a major role in helping the opposers of the regime, and extradited many of them to Italy.

recommendations.title: A Brighter Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: An old film director, unhappy with the movie he's shooting about a Hungarian circus stranded in Rome during the 1956 anti-Soviet uprising, faces divorce from his producer wife and other problems.
